title: Support uvm_tlm_generic_payload randomization
body:
The UVM tests/11tlm/20tlm2/10gp/10func and tests/11tlm/20tlm2/10gp/20extfunc fail due to randomizaiton failures, probably due to the CONSTRAINTIGN warnings.

@YilouWang might you get a chance to investigate?  Thanks in advance.

[t_0.py.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26000892/t_0.py.txt)
[t_0.v.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26000891/t_0.v.txt)

Running the simplified version that is attached:  (Once figure out the issue please try to remove UVM requirement).

```
%Warning-CONSTRAINTIGN: t/t_0.v:40:18: Unsupported: randomizing this expression, treating as state
   40 |           m_data.size == m_length;
%Warning-CONSTRAINTIGN: t/t_0.v:43:25: Unsupported: randomizing this expression, treating as state
   43 |           m_byte_enable.size == m_byte_enable_length;
...
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:40: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_data.size == m_length;'
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:39: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_length == 10;'
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:39: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_length == 10;'
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:43: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_byte_enable.size == m_byte_enable_length;'
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:39: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_length == 10;'
%Warning-UNSATCONSTR: t/t_0.v:40: Unsatisfied constraint: 'm_data.size == m_length;'
[0] %Error: t_0.v:37: Assertion failed in t.test.run_phase.unnamedblk1: 'assert' failed.
```
